chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 3072 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case. 19.12.2019. Mr. Badal Gahoti, advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G Mr. Shahid Ahmed Shaikh, D.P.G for the State. = It is stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that both the detainees has surfaced one after other and the petitioner would not press the disposal of instant petition before this Court on its merit, if she is permitted to exhaust an alternate remedy u/s 200 Cr.P.C. before the Court having jurisdiction against the proposed accused for having committed a cognizable offence against the petitioner. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmed/Pa,
